description_long: This is a large, modern desk with a light gray finish and a wide, flat work surface. It features two sets of drawers on either side, providing ample storage space. On top of the desk sits a triple-monitor setup with curved screens, supported by a central monitor arm, and a compact desktop computer is positioned on the left. The desk also includes a keyboard, mouse, and a spherical speaker or webcam on the right. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for high-performance computing or gaming. The materials appear to be primarily wood or engineered wood with metal and plastic components for the monitor arm and accessories.
description: A modern, wide desk with dual drawer sets, triple curved monitors, and a sleek, light gray finish. Includes a computer, keyboard, and a spherical accessory.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full desk surface, triple monitors, drawers, computer, and accessories.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the monitor curvature, and the drawer thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitors, monitor arm, and the symmetry of the desk's structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right-side drawers, monitor curvature, and spherical accessory.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the monitors, drawers, and computer accessible; the back is plain with monitor supports visible.
